note: The ISSUE-5 regression guard. An accepted village activity pinned to the routine is a zero-external-dispatch, reversible internal write. Its ONLY required check is check_action_idempotency; with a real action_hash on the payload (the fix), the reviewer can pass it, the check returns ok:true (no prior duplicate), coverage is satisfied, and the reviewer must APPROVE. Before the fix the missing hash made the check error → coverage failed → flagged → silently un-completable.

payload.title: EarlyON Child and Family Centre drop-in
payload.summary: Free drop-in play + caregiver support, serves your area.
